description: SmartSafe CNC 605 PRO PLUS is a cleaning and testing equipment suitable for piezoelectric (140V), GDI (65V/12V) and conventional fuel injectors. It uses ultrasonic cleaning technology combined with microprocessor oil pressure control technology to simulate various engine working conditions and clean and test automobile fuel injectors.

features.description: Can select EFI (12V), GDI (65V) or PIEZO (140V) operating mode based on the injector type
features.title: Multi-Mode Operation

features.description: Capable of simultaneously ultrasonic cleaning multiple injectors, effectively removing carbon buildup
features.title: Ultrasonic Cleaning

features.description: Includes low resistance testing, uniformity/spray testing, sealing test, and fuel injection quantity detection
features.title: Comprehensive Testing

name: CNC 605 PRO PLUS
specs: Working mode selection: Can select EFI (12V), GDI (65V) or PIEZO (140V) operating mode based on the injector type
Ultrasonic Cleaning: Capable of simultaneously ultrasonic cleaning multiple injectors, effectively removing carbon buildup
Low resistance testing: Supports low-resistance injector testing, capable of detecting short circuits and open circuits in fuel injectors

Uniformity/Spray Testing Function: Detects the uniformity of fuel injection quantity for each injector and the spray atomization of the injector can be comprehensively and carefully observed using the background light
Sealing Test Function: Tests the sealing and leakage of injectors under system pressure
Fuel Injection Quantity Detection Function: Measures the fuel injection quantity of injectors under a constant 15-second injection condition
Automatic Cleaning and Testing Function: Under specific working parameters, realistically simulates injector testing under various conditions

Reverse Flush Function: For the uniformity/spray testing item, performs a reverse flush using a reverse flush adapter to remove internal injector contaminants and residues attached to the filter screen
Non-Dismantle Cleaning Function: Equipped with various non-dismantle cleaning adapters, allowing non-dismantle cleaning and maintenance for multiple vehicle models
summary: CNC605+ is a cleaning and testing equipment suitable for piezoelectric (140V), GDI (65V/12V) and conventional fuel injectors.

description: CNC605 launched by SmartSafe, is a Injector Cleaner and Tester suitable for GDI, EFI, SFI and other injectors. The injector can be cleaned and tested by simulating the engine condition. It can also be used to clean the fuel injector ad fuel supply system on the vehicle without disassembly. It is ideal for repair and maintenance service centers!

features.description: Supports cleaning and testing of GDI, EFI, and SFI fuel injectors
features.title: Multi-Injector Support

features.description: Utilizes ultrasonic intensive cleaning technology to thoroughly remove carbon deposits and filter screen residues
features.title: Ultrasonic Technology

features.description: Utilizes microcomputer automatic control technology for automatic control of the cleaning and testing process
features.title: Automatic Control

name: CNC605 GDI Injector Cleaner & Tester
specs: Supports cleaning and testing of GDI, EFI, and SFI fuel injectors
Utilizes ultrasonic intensive cleaning technology to thoroughly remove carbon deposits and filter screen residues from the fuel injectors
Utilizes microcomputer automatic control technology for automatic control of the cleaning and testing process, and real-time monitoring of the key performance of the fuel injectors
Equipped with various non-dismantle cleaning connectors, capable of non-dismantle cleaning and maintenance for multiple vehicle models
Through simulating engine operating conditions, comprehensively tests various aspects of the fuel injector's performance
Working Mode Selection: Can select GDI or EFI working mode based on the injector type
Ultrasonic Cleaning: Capable of simultaneously ultrasonic cleaning multiple injectors, effectively removing carbon buildup
Uniformity/Spray Testing: Detects the uniformity of fuel injection quantity for each injector and allows comprehensive observation of the injector spray pattern using background lighting
Sealing Test: Tests the sealing and leakage of injectors under system pressure
Fuel Injection Quantity Detection: Measures the fuel injection quantity of injectors under a constant 15-second injection condition
summary: CNC605 is an Injector Cleaner and Tester suitable for GDI, EFI, SFI, and other injectors. The injector can be cleaned and tested by simulating the engine condition.

description: The VSP-828 videoscope is designed for accessing narrow, curved spaces like evaporation boxes, combustion chambers, and three-way catalytic sensors. It captures vivid, clear and multi-angle videos and images, transferring them to a computer or smartphone display via a data cable for versatile inspections. Three versions with varying lens tubes are available for your choice.

features.description: Three lens versions available: 6.2mm Rotating Lens, 5.5mm Dual-lens, and 5.5mm Standard Version
features.title: Multiple Lens Options

features.description: 4GB built-in storage with support for external TF cards up to 32GB, picture taking and audio/video recording
features.title: Storage & Recording

features.description: Flashlight assist, 3x magnification, 4-gear LED light adjustment, image rotation and color switching
features.title: Advanced Features

name: VSP-828
specs: Three lens versions for choice: 6.2mm Rotating Lens Version (RECOMMENDED), 5.5mm Dual-lens Version (Switch between front and side), 5.5mm Standard Version (Single direction)
4GB built-in storage on mainboard
Support for external TF cards up to 32GB
Picture taking & audio/video recording supported
Flashlight assist function
3 times magnification can be achieved
4-gear LED light for adjustment
Rotate static image in 4 directions
Switch the image between black-and-white and color
High temperature alarm function
summary: The VSP-828 videoscope is designed for accessing narrow, curved spaces like evaporation boxes, combustion chambers, and three-way catalytic sensors.

technicalTable.label: Diameter
technicalTable.value: 5.5mm single lens tube / 5.5mm dual lens tube / 6.2mm rotating lens tube available

description: SmartSafe WA861 PRO is an Ultra HD 4 wheel alignment machine. Automatically adjusts the height of the camera beam according to the height of the target, moving cabinets and beams built for increased productivity. It is an intelligent 3D four-wheel aligner that can collect ultra-high speed and high-precision tire data for the vehicle.

features.title: Ultra HD Camera

features.description: 50000+ global vehicle model database with lifetime free upgrade

features.description: Intelligent self-adaptive tracking system that automatically tracks the target and adjusts beam height

name: WA861 PRO 3D Wheel Aligner
specs: 50000+ global vehicle model database, lifetime free upgrade
5 million pixel industrial camera, easily adapt to a variety of lighting environment
8-12 cm rolling compensation, saving time and effort
Adaptive tracking system, freely adjust the operating space under the chassis
The whole machine is movable and can be shared by multiple stations, which improves the space utilization rate of the repair shop

Four-wheel alignment measurement with standard and quick measurement modes
Intelligent self-adaptive tracking system that automatically tracks the target

Support measurement report saving and printing

description: The LAUNCH plug-to-play battery tester BST-560S is designed for many battery-powered vehicles such as cars, boats, motorcycles more. It's a compact handheld design with LCD display.

features.description: International measurement standards supported including CCA, BCI, CA, MCA, JIS, DIN, IEC, EN, SAE, GB
features.title: Multiple Standards

features.description: 6 battery & electrical test functions including Ripple Detection, Battery Test, Electric Current Test, Starter Test, Charging System Test, and Voltage Test
features.title: Comprehensive Testing

features.description: Generate health report within 3 seconds and intuitively display all data on the color screen
features.title: Fast Results

name: BST-560S
specs: International measurement standards supported: CCA, BCI, CA, MCA, JIS, DIN, IEC, EN, SAE, GB
6 battery & electrical test functions supported: Ripple Detection, Battery Test, Electric Current Test, Starter Test, Charging System Test, Voltage Test
Generate the health report within 3 seconds and intuitively display all data on the color screen
Available to the batch inspection of battery by testing continuously and repeatedly
Applicable vehicles include car, motorcycles, lawn mowers and other gardening machines, Group 31, commercial vehicles 4D/8D
Applicable battery types include 12V: Regular Flooded, Gel Battery, AGM Battery, EFB Battery, Lithium Battery
Applicable 12V vehicle's Starter Test and Rectifier Diode Test
Safety always comes first. No heating, no discharge, no spark and no operating risks
Multi-language supported
summary: The LAUNCH plug-to-play battery tester BST-560S is designed for many battery-powered vehicles such as cars, boats, motorcycles more. It's a compact handheld design with LCD display.

description: Composed of two magnetic measurement units and four wheel clamp targets, connected via a wireless network, the X-613 is another wireless, ready-to-use four-wheel aligner for repair shops. Unlike traditional 3D wheel aligners, the X-613 eliminates the need for beams and cabinets, pairing with the LAUNCH diagnostic tool(X-431 PAD9/7/5 LINK) to perform precise four-wheel alignment detection. The X-613 supports both standard measurement and quick measurement, including key parameters such as toe, camber, caster, kingpin inclination, and thrust angle, as well as additional measurements including track width, wheelbase, wheel offset, axle offset, diagonal offset, and center offset.

features.description: No wiring required, ready to use by simply screwing targets onto wheel clamps
features.title: Wireless Ready-to-Use

features.description: No beams or cabinets for preinstallation, ideal for repair shops with limited space
features.title: Space Saving

features.description: Supports alignment data for 50,000+ vehicle models worldwide
features.title: Extensive Database

name: X-613 Portable 3D Wheel Aligner
specs: 2 magnetic measurement units + 4 wheel clamp targets
No wiring required, ready to use
No beams or cabinets needed
Supports 50,000+ vehicle models
Generates results within 30 seconds
Compatible with X-431 PAD9/7/5 LINK
Supports both standard and quick measurement
Measures toe, camber, caster, kingpin inclination, thrust angle
Additional measurements: track width, wheelbase, wheel offset, axle offset, diagonal offset, center offset
summary: Composed of two magnetic measurement units and four wheel clamp targets, the X-613 is a wireless, ready-to-use four-wheel aligner for repair shops.
